name: Customer Family Summary
query:
SELECT
	root.name as "Root Customer:Link/Customer:160",
	root.customer_name as "Root Customer Name::200",
	COALESCE(fam.customers_in_family, 1) as "# Customers:Int:90",
	COALESCE(so.total_so, 0) as "Total SO:Currency:120",
	COALESCE(si.total_si, 0) as "Total SI:Currency:120",
	COALESCE(si.outstanding, 0) as "Outstanding:Currency:120"
FROM
	`tabCustomer` root
LEFT JOIN (
	SELECT
		COALESCE(NULLIF(cm_root_customer, ''), name) as root_customer,
		COUNT(*) as customers_in_family
	FROM
		`tabCustomer`
	GROUP BY
		COALESCE(NULLIF(cm_root_customer, ''), name)
) fam ON fam.root_customer = root.name
LEFT JOIN (
	SELECT
		COALESCE(NULLIF(c.cm_root_customer, ''), c.name) as root_customer,
		SUM(so.base_net_total) as total_so
	FROM
		`tabSales Order` so
		JOIN `tabCustomer` c ON c.name = so.customer
	WHERE
		so.docstatus = 1
		AND (%(from_date)s IS NULL OR so.transaction_date >= %(from_date)s)
		AND (%(to_date)s IS NULL OR so.transaction_date <= %(to_date)s)
		AND (%(sales_person)s IS NULL OR EXISTS (
			SELECT 1 FROM `tabSales Team` st
			WHERE st.parenttype = 'Sales Order' AND st.parent = so.name AND st.sales_person = %(sales_person)s
		))
	GROUP BY
		COALESCE(NULLIF(c.cm_root_customer, ''), c.name)
) so ON so.root_customer = root.name
LEFT JOIN (
	SELECT
		COALESCE(NULLIF(c.cm_root_customer, ''), c.name) as root_customer,
		SUM(si.base_net_total) as total_si,
		SUM(si.outstanding_amount) as outstanding
	FROM
		`tabSales Invoice` si
		JOIN `tabCustomer` c ON c.name = si.customer
	WHERE
		si.docstatus = 1
		AND (%(from_date)s IS NULL OR si.posting_date >= %(from_date)s)
		AND (%(to_date)s IS NULL OR si.posting_date <= %(to_date)s)
		AND (%(sales_person)s IS NULL OR EXISTS (
			SELECT 1 FROM `tabSales Team` st
			WHERE st.parenttype = 'Sales Invoice' AND st.parent = si.name AND st.sales_person = %(sales_person)s
		))
	GROUP BY
		COALESCE(NULLIF(c.cm_root_customer, ''), c.name)
) si ON si.root_customer = root.name
WHERE
	COALESCE(NULLIF(root.cm_root_customer, ''), root.name) = root.name
	AND (%(root_customer)s IS NULL OR root.name = %(root_customer)s)
ORDER BY
	root.customer_name
